checkpoint_sheet.title: Day 2 Checkpoint — Budget Calculations
checkpoint_sheet.checkpoint_focus: Student can set up and solve a proportion from a real budget constraint without prompting.
look_fors: Proportion is written correctly before solving (not just a final answer).
Student can explain why the ratio matters, not just what it equals.
Numbers in the budget sum correctly to the total.
conference_prompts: Walk me through how you set up your ratio.
If the total budget changed to $800, what would you adjust first?
What would you do if your answer pushed you over budget?
checkpoint_sheet.release_rule: Student may proceed to Day 3 once one proportion is set up and solved correctly with work shown.
